title: My system captured the fall perfectly.
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
[](https://preview.redd.it/closed-a-1300-points-gain-in-this-fall-v0-ok6pxi11lo3h1.jpg?width=1272&format=pjpg&auto=webp&s=feee8a9bad879e38b23b16a7d84b2029f68f703b)

https://preview.redd.it/l6fu71hklo3h1.jpg?width=1272&format=pjpg&auto=webp&s=1db2379b75151e7fdd67417c88b978903920bfb0

  
The trade was given by my system 3 days ago and I had place the trade without any second thought and it gave me huge win.

Price still going down but I am happy with the gain even after the terrific volatility.

My ML system has already predicted the fall earlier and I sticked to it and the result is infront of you all.

If anyone is interested to know the details feel free to ask or message.
